records.description: Manual lathe with collet and three jaw chuck
Any Process or Operation Required for a Job that is an External/Outside Process.
Work can be assigned to any mill
These work orders need programmed, and set up info added to proshop
Turning, 13" chuck, 3" spindle tube, ~21" Z travel
Mill-Turn, 2" spindle tube, 6" chuck, 3J collet chuck

Pre-Processing: Prepared Tool Caddy Organized and Loaded with Required Cutting Tools Prior to CNC Operation. Should include: OOH & Tool Holders Touched Off and Matching Proshop Values, Pull Stud Check, etc.
Tooling/Fixture Set-up Required for the Job. Part of the Pre-Processing Checklist Procedure when used.
